name: Tokyo New York London Weather Comparison
description: Research the current weather in Tokyo, New York, and London. Compare the temperatures and summarize which city is warmest and which is coldest right now.

tasks.name: Research Current Weather in Tokyo, New York, and London
tasks.description: Use web_search to find the current weather in Tokyo, New York, and London.
tasks.success_criteria: Current weather data for Tokyo, New York, and London

tasks.name: Extract Temperature Data from Weather Information
tasks.description: Use python_exec to extract temperature data from the weather information.
tasks.success_criteria: Temperature data for Tokyo, New York, and London

tasks.name: Compare Temperatures and Determine Warmest and Coldest Cities
tasks.description: Use python_exec to compare the temperatures and determine which city is warmest and which is coldest.
tasks.success_criteria: Summary of warmest and coldest cities

tasks.name: Save Weather Comparison Summary
tasks.description: Save the weather comparison summary to a file.
tasks.success_criteria: Weather comparison summary saved to file
